---

config:
    theme: 'base'
    themeVariables:
        primaryColor: '#1f2020'
        primaryTextColor: '#f0f0f0'
        background: '#333'
        primaryBorderColor: '#888888'
        lineColor: '#999'

---

stateDiagram

IDLE

IDLE : IDLE

state "COMBAT_SEQUENCE" as COMBAT_SEQUENCE {

        %% Initial state name as "." so that it fits in black circle shape.
        %% See https://github.com/StateSmith/StateSmith/issues/404
        state "." as COMBAT_SEQUENCE.(InitialState)

        CHECK_HIT

        CHECK_HIT : CHECK_HIT

        CHECK_HIT : enter / { DoRollToHit(); }

        CHECK_MATERIAL

        CHECK_MATERIAL : CHECK_MATERIAL

        CHECK_MATERIAL : enter / { DoCheckMaterial(); }

        CHECK_RESISTANCE

        CHECK_RESISTANCE : CHECK_RESISTANCE

        CHECK_RESISTANCE : enter / { DoCheckResistance(); }

        CALCULATE_DAMAGE

        CALCULATE_DAMAGE : CALCULATE_DAMAGE

        CALCULATE_DAMAGE : enter / { DoCalcDamage(); }

        APPLY_DAMAGE

        APPLY_DAMAGE : APPLY_DAMAGE

        APPLY_DAMAGE : enter / { DoApplyDamage(); }

        END_MISS

        END_MISS : END_MISS

        END_MISS : enter / { LogMiss(); }

        END_IMMUNE

        END_IMMUNE : END_IMMUNE

        END_IMMUNE : enter / { LogImmune(); }

        END_RESISTED

        END_RESISTED : END_RESISTED

        END_RESISTED : enter / { LogResisted(); }

}

%% Initial state name as "." so that it fits in black circle shape.
%% See https://github.com/StateSmith/StateSmith/issues/404
state "." as ROOT.(InitialState)

IDLE --> COMBAT_SEQUENCE : PROCESS_ATTACK

COMBAT_SEQUENCE.(InitialState) --> CHECK_HIT

CHECK_HIT --> CHECK_MATERIAL : do [IsHit]

CHECK_HIT --> END_MISS : else

CHECK_MATERIAL --> CHECK_RESISTANCE : do [IsMaterialEffective]

CHECK_MATERIAL --> END_IMMUNE : else

CHECK_RESISTANCE --> CALCULATE_DAMAGE : do [!IsResisted]

CHECK_RESISTANCE --> END_RESISTED : else

CALCULATE_DAMAGE --> APPLY_DAMAGE : do

APPLY_DAMAGE --> IDLE : do

END_MISS --> IDLE : do

END_IMMUNE --> IDLE : do

END_RESISTED --> IDLE : do

ROOT.(InitialState) --> IDLE
StateSmith Simulator
settings delete help
Colors:
